query:
SELECT
                    EXISTS(
                        SELECT 1 FROM subscriptions_title_group_torrents
                        WHERE title_group_id = $1 AND user_id = $2
                    ) AS "is_subscribed_to_torrents!",
                    EXISTS(
                        SELECT 1 FROM subscriptions_title_group_comments
                        WHERE title_group_id = $1 AND user_id = $2
                    ) AS "is_subscribed_to_comments!"
